title: Shopify connection failure due to insufficient permissions
symptom: When attempting to connect to Shopify, n8n displays 'Couldn’t connect with these settings'. The connection fails without detailed error information.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different integration
root_cause: The error occurs because the API credentials provided do not have sufficient permissions to establish a connection. In this case, only 'read_orders' permission was granted, which is not enough for the connection to succeed.
fix_steps: Ensure all recommended permissions are granted (e.g., read_orders, write_orders, read_products, write_products)
Attempt to connect again in n8n
agent_instruction: Grant all recommended permissions in the Shopify app settings and try connecting again.
